overview: Indi Negocio Livre (MA Herb Business Manager) is a comprehensive, multi-tenant, mobile-first business management web app for herbal product distributors. Built with React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS and Motoko on the Internet Computer.
features: Role-based access control (Super Admin, Admin, Staff, Referral User)
Customer management with body composition tracking
Sales order management with FIFO inventory
Customer goals and medical issues tracking
